{{Infobox character
|name=White Rabbit
|species=Rabbit
|status=<span class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed" data-expandtext="Spoiler — reveal" data-collapsetext="Hide">Alive</span>
|occupation=Herald
|affiliation=[[Court of Hearts]]
|first_seen=Chapter 1
}}

== Biography ==
The '''White Rabbit''' is a fretful, waistcoat-wearing rabbit who hurries through [[Wonderland]] muttering ''"Oh dear! I shall be late!"'' It is he Alice follows down the [[Rabbit Hole]].


[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Main Characters]]
[[Category:Characters (Book 1)]]
